addons.name: Oscilloscope
addons.description: Classic green waveform scope that traces the live audio signal.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Demucs v4 Stems
addons.description: Split local songs into Vocals, Drums, Bass and Melody (HTDemucs v4 fine-tuned). Right-click a track ▸ Demucs v4 ▸ Get stems.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Demucs 6s Stems
addons.description: Split local songs into 6 stems — Vocals, Drums, Bass, Guitar, Piano, Other (HTDemucs 6s). Right-click a track ▸ Demucs 6s ▸ Get stems.
addons.author: kl3mta3
